title: What's in Store for Alexandria (ARE) This Earnings Season?

title: Buy The Crash: 2 REIT Stocks For 2022

title: Is Now The Time to Buy Shares of Alexandria Real Estate Equities?
text: Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc (NYSE:ARE) is the largest office real estate investment trust (REIT) in the U.S. by market capitalization and has been one of the best performing office REITs over the past five years. The company was also one of the first in its sector to see its share price recover from the COVID-19 pandemic.

title: Alexandria Real Estate: Stable Dividend With An Expected Raise
text: More than 15% of the company's total revenue comes from pharma and lab space rentals. ARE is yielding 2.2% and I expect a dividend raise of 2-7% in 2022.

title: Alexandria (ARE) Prices 7M Share Offering for Forward Sale
text: The public offering will boost Alexandria's (ARE) financial flexibility and offer ample scope for deploying capital to long-term growth opportunities as well as help meet its debt obligations.

title: Why 2022 Could Be a Tough Year for Office REITs
text: Many people still work remotely, and the demand for office space may never return to what it was.
